title: Hatsune Miku's Leek
description: I made the Leek wich belongs to the vocaloid Hatsune Miku
body:
## 🥬 Miku Leek Sword – Because Regular Netherite is Too Mainstream

Tired of boring old Netherite swords? Rename it **Leek** and BOOM — now you're wielding Hatsune Miku’s ultimate weapon: the mighty green onion. Yes, really.

### 🎤 FEATURES:

Slap a new name on your Netherite Sword (literally just “Leek”) and watch it transform into the legendary Vocaloid Vegetable of Doom

Looks so good it might make Endermen start dancing


![The Leek](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0df843dc5fe03d972262357082de4887609c7447.png)








#### 🧪 Requires:

you will need **optifne**(forge) or **CIT Resewn**(fabric) to make it work (‘Cause vanilla Minecraft doesn’t believe in anime magic)
